overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in white clothing running through a sunlit urban downtown environment resembling San Francisco. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets, and weaves through light traffic and pedestrians during golden hour with long shadows cast across the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with historic arch monument

events.description: character steps from sidewalk onto asphalt crosswalk to cross the street
character completes street crossing and continues running along opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running steadily from the San Fierro arch structure, crossing the intersection, and continuing along the sidewalk past storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: cylindrical stone monument with SAN FIERRO signage
tall red brick building with multiple windows and decorative cornice
rectangular business sign mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a prominent stone arch monument labeled SAN FIERRO. The character runs along the sidewalk and crosses a street intersection, passing a USA Cash Express sign. The historic brick building dominates the right side of the frame as the character maintains a steady running pace through the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined commercial street with large billboard

events.description: large pink THRUSS billboard becomes visible on the left building facade
character passes parked vehicles including a dark van and white sedan along the curb

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and parked cars, maintaining a steady pace past the THRUSS billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking toward the camera direction

entered.detail: large rectangular advertisement with pink background and white text reading THRUSS
mature deciduous trees with green canopies lining the sidewalk
dark colored utility van parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a tree-lined sidewalk past a prominent pink THRUSS billboard. The street features moderate pedestrian traffic and parked vehicles including a dark van. The historic brick building remains visible on the right while the character passes various pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with classical government building

events.description: character slows to a complete stop at the street corner to wait for pedestrians
character resumes running and turns right to cross the street intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the street corner, stopping to allow a group of pedestrians to cross in front, then continuing across the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians crossing the sidewalk in front of the character

entered.detail: large stone building with classical columns and symmetrical facade
textured yellow accessibility ramp at the street corner
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide street corner dominated by a large classical government building on the right. The character stops at the corner ramp to wait for pedestrians to cross, then resumes running across the intersection. The traffic signal pole stands prominently at the corner as pedestrians move through the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street with tram tracks and commercial buildings

events.description: character moves from sidewalk onto the asphalt street to run in the bike lane
character weaves between a white pickup truck and a black sedan while running in the street

agents.ego_description: running in the street alongside traffic, passing various vehicles including a truck and tram, then returning to the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white pickup truck driving alongside the character in the traffic lane

entered.detail: corner building with large DIAMOND CHIC signage on the facade
red and white public transit tram moving along tracks in the street
large orange and white construction truck parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The character runs in the street alongside moderate traffic, passing a white pickup truck and weaving between vehicles. The Diamond Chic building dominates the right side while a red tram moves along tracks on the left. The character passes a large construction truck before the segment ends, with the classical government building now visible on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling commercial district that transitions from a historic monument area into a dense urban intersection. It begins near a stone arch labeled San Fierro, following the character as they run past a USA Cash Express sign and a dominant brick building. As the character continues along a tree-lined sidewalk, the scene shifts past a pink Thruss billboard and parked vehicles before approaching a wide corner anchored by a large classical government building. The camera then tracks the character as they pause at a traffic signal and resume their run across the intersection, weaving into the street alongside moderate traffic. Finally, the perspective shifts to follow the character past a red tram and a white pickup truck, moving toward the Diamond Chic building while the government structure recedes into the background on the left.
